title: Accessing bit values of an enum inside a struct returns enum value instead of bit value

features.name: packed struct containing enum field
features.description: Code should include a packed struct with an enum-typed field where the enum has an explicit bit vector base type
features.snippet:
typedef enum bit [2:0] { ENUM_VAL = 3'b110 } enumtype;
typedef struct packed { enumtype t; } sbus_t;

features.name: bit indexing on enum field inside packed struct
features.description: Code should include bit indexing on an enum field that is a member of a packed struct, which should return individual bit values but incorrectly returns the enum integer value

features.name: enum with explicit bit vector base type
features.description: Code should include an enum typedef with an explicit bit vector base type that is embedded in a packed struct
